description_long: This object is a whole avocado with a classic pear-like shape, featuring a slightly tapered top and a broader, rounded base. Its skin is a deep green color, speckled with lighter green and yellowish dots, and has a slightly bumpy, matte texture. The surface shows a few small, dark spots and minor blemishes, typical of natural avocados. At the top, a small, circular stem scar is visible, indicating where the fruit was attached to the tree. The overall appearance suggests a firm, intact fruit with no visible cuts or openings. The avocado is presented against a clean, white background, highlighting its natural form and coloration.
description: A whole, deep green avocado with a bumpy, speckled skin and a visible stem scar at the top. The surface is matte with minor natural blemishes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broadest part of the avocado with a smooth, uninterrupted green surface and subtle speckling.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the gentle tapering towards the top and a more uniform green coloration with fewer blemishes.
description_view_2: The top of the avocado is visible, showing the small, circular stem scar and more pronounced speckling.
description_view_3: This angled view emphasizes the stem scar and reveals a few more dark spots and natural surface irregularities.
attribute_skin_blemishes: small dark spots and minor surface irregularities
